expectations.text: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about multi-agent ID collision or O-entry conflict
expectations.evidence: Found T0049 (ID-Konflikt-Prävention, marked ✓ done) and P0048.8.9 (full implementation details) — even richer than with_skill by finding T0049.

expectations.text: Agent tries splitting compound terms or using English equivalents (collision, conflict, multi-agent)
expectations.evidence: Attempts included: 'O-Entry collision multi-agent concurrent writes', 'O-Entry conflict parallel agents', 'O-Entry ID collision duplicate parallel', 'append_memory collision concurrent', 'write_memory race condition' — extensive English/synonym variation.

expectations.text: Agent makes more than one search attempt
expectations.evidence: 12 search steps before finding P0048.8.9 — used 'race condition' as unexpected angle to reach P0048.6 Bugs section, then expanded P0048 to find P0048.8.9.
